completeness_boundary: The full cited PDF was reviewed and searched. not_reported means that no explicit statement was found in that source.

probes.question: Does the reported system maintain a cumulative Findings Memory containing both prior human knowledge and its own historical findings to guide later exploration?
Does the reported system use an Upper Confidence Bound acquisition function to select which Idea Finding is promoted for experimental validation?
Does a deeply validated record enter the system's knowledge base and influence decision-making in subsequent cycles?
Does the paper assess final generated papers through both an automated reviewer with external search and a separate human program committee?
Were all research ideas generated in the reported runs implemented and experimentally validated?
Was the reported experimental process conducted without human supervision or human verification?
Did the initial implementation attempts reliably complete without false positives or agent timeouts?
Did the reported deployed system already conduct physical-science experiments through robotics?
Does the paper report a probabilistic calibration analysis of the surrogate reviewer's 0-to-100 valuation scores?
Does the paper state that the month-long discovery study and its analysis plan were prospectively preregistered?
Does the paper report an independent external laboratory replication of a DeepScientist-generated method?
Does the paper report a randomized, blinded head-to-head trial comparing DeepScientist's discovery performance with human researchers on the same tasks and resource budget?
